# API Checklist: Schedule open-data refresh jobs

**Purpose**: Validate refresh API contracts for triggering runs and inspecting status.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/022-schedule-refresh-jobs/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Trigger Contract

- [x] CHK-API-001 Endpoint accepts scheduled or on-demand trigger.
- [x] CHK-API-002 Request validation rejects invalid triggers.

## Status Contract

- [x] CHK-API-003 Status response includes step runs with retry counts.
- [x] CHK-API-004 Status response includes final summary with reasons.

## Failure States

- [x] CHK-API-005 Failure responses include actionable error details.
- [x] CHK-API-006 Start failures prevent step execution and are reported.
